scripts.build: tsc -b && BROWSER=chrome vite build && node scripts/fix-extension-paths.mjs dist-chrome
scripts.build:chrome: tsc -b && BROWSER=chrome vite build && node scripts/fix-extension-paths.mjs dist-chrome
scripts.build:firefox: tsc -b && BROWSER=firefox vite build && node scripts/fix-extension-paths.mjs dist-firefox
scripts.build:all: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
